# PropArt‚Ñ¢ Creator Space ‚Äî llms.txt
# https://github.com/PegasusSuite/PropArt-Creator-Space

Site: PropArt‚Ñ¢ polymer-clay workflows, booth shop, games, courses, and community.
Primary audience: hobbyists and makers shopping handmade supplies and digital resources.

## Key URLs (when deployed)
- / ‚Äî main SPA (tabs include Home, How it works, Examples, The Shop, Premium Tools; Admin when owner)
- /products.html ‚Äî PropArt‚Ñ¢ booth catalog (3 handiwork SKUs + digital guides)
- /booth-handout.html ‚Äî print-ready customer handout (QR + SKU list)
- /booth-table-sign.html ‚Äî large-format fair-table sign
- /suite/index.html ‚Äî Directory of Applications (Cropper, Studio, Color Blend, etc.)
- /about.html ‚Äî Pegasus Suite LLC mission

## Contact
- Public inbox: contact@latrese.world  
- Strategic / internal docs stay in-repo only; Hosting does not serve `*.md` from this bundle.

## First-run UX (implemented on main page)
- Browse without login; checkout can use guest flow.
- Compact sticky tab bar; reduced vertical padding; mobile tabs single-row scroll.
- Hero + trust strip + 3-step path; search + shop filters; guest cart; newsletter; Firebase Analytics (`__CRAFT_DEBUG` for verbose logs).
